calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request For Entry Of Default Judgment For Damages
Off Calendar Mar-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Erick K. Shiu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Salesforce.com.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) EquityStar Capital Management, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Paul Guernsey sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $93,344.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $18,205.99
Attorney's Fees: $3,467.50
Costs: $715.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $115,732.49
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
